hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$f" in *.lua) if command -v stylua >/dev/null 2>&1; then stylua "$f" 2>/tmp/stylua-hook.err || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"stylua: failed to format $f (parse error?) — left unformatted\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"stylua not found on \$PATH — skipped formatting $f\"}"; fi ;; esac; exit 0
